violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose all the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The door to the outside, located at the top of the stairs to the ice machine basement area is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Food observed stored on the floor in the basement walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Pizza boxes observed stored on the floor in the dining room. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: prep units refrigerators freezers lowboy . New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The grease recycling receptacle has an accumulation of grease and debris. Grease receptacle must be cleaned or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment especially the basement. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The floors and walls in the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2026

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024

Raw animal foods (such as ground meat) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as feta for salads, and cooked chicken) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from ready-to-eat food during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer must be cleaned and sanitized before use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

A knife was observed stored on an unclean surface (between the two lids of the prep table) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The slicer was not in good repair, with a hole in the upper case. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2024

The cutting boards in the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the table beneath the grill have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
A metal panel on the front of the hood is in poor repair, broken with pieces missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2024

Raw animal foods (such as ground meat and ) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked items) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat foods during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer is to be cleaned and sanitized before use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Tongs observed stored inside a container of coleslaw. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The floor mixer was not in good repair, with a hole in the upper case, exposing layers of materials that are flaking off. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2024
The ice scoop was not in good repair, with a large piece missing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The cutting boards in the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2024

Aluminum wrap observed lining shelves in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: food storage bins beneath the counter in the dough area table beneath grill sides of fryers can opener base Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
The hand sink in the kitchen is in poor repair, nonfunctional during inspection . The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
A metal panel on the front of the hood is in poor repair, broken, with pieces missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2024
One panel of ceiling lights was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2024

No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. An employee certified in food safety must be present anytime food is being prepared or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, tongs) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Soups and potatoes observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the 2 door basement refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the basement walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement area. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the basement. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor, New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The cutting boards in the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2024

Aluminum wrap is used to line shelves in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The area around the oil recycling container has an accumulation of oil, grease, and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2024
